name: Paladin
abilities:
Guardian — the party's wall. 🛡3 and always blocks 1 hit (+1🛡 base). While you stand next to an ally, that ally rolls +1 defense die (you soak the blows). If you block EVERY skull thrown at you, your guard bites back for 1 (riposte). +1 attack die vs minions.

2☼: Give an ally +1 to their next roll (lose 1 life).
3☼: Draw an extra card.
End your turn beside an ally to regain 2 life.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense; shields block AND scramble you 1 space each.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.
7◆: Allies 1 space away get +1 to their rolls.

5◆ (6☼): Teleport next to any living ally (lose 2 life).

name: Barbarian
abilities:
Bloodlust — the angrier, the deadlier. At half life or less you roll +2 attack dice. +1 attack die vs minions, and regain 2 life whenever your strike destroys a minion — a wounded Barbarian is a rampage.

4☼: On your next move, destroy every minion you end adjacent to along the way.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense; shields block and scramble. Caught in a building, leave through a door for -2 life.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Haul every minion 6+ spaces away next to you and fight them (spend extra ☼ to reach farther).

name: Hunter
abilities:
Pack tactics — reach 2, and +1 attack die whenever your target is pinned by an ally or your pet. Flank, then fire.

3☼: Summon your pet (🐾 button) — a hero-side piece (⚔1 / 🛡1 / ❤3). 2☼: your pet takes an action. The pet shares your movement rolls (not bonus dice), flies over obstacles (not walls), and is DESTROYED if it ever fights the monster itself. Use it to pin targets for your shots.

Escape: Flee like any hero — your reach keeps you clear.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Summon a second pet.

name: Scout
abilities:
Recon — sees far (sight 8) and is never truly cornered. Once each turn you may Flee even on 0 shields: you take the hit but ALWAYS slip out of sight/reach.

1☼: +2 to your movement roll.
5֍: spend a movement roll as an action.

Escape: your Flee never fails to move you — the party's escape artist.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (4☼): Dash to any wall in line of sight, then end your turn.

name: Wizard
abilities:
Arcane artillery — frail (❤4) but casts at reach 2, and your bolts PIERCE 1 (ignore one of the target's shields — armor won't save them). Your power grows: at 5 objectives your attack is +2 dice.

2☼: Reroll any of your dice this turn.
4☼: Draw an extra card.
You may discard a card to draw another.

Escape: Flee like any hero — you're fragile, so break line of sight fast.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
3◇: Relocate 1 door.
5◇: Relocate 1 door.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
5◆: Spell power +2 attack dice (permanent).
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Trade places with any object on the board.

name: Enchantress
abilities:
Hexweaver — every enemy you strike is HEXED: −1 attack die until the end of the turn. Hit the monster or a minion to blunt it for your allies.

4☼: Walk through a wall.
5☼: Move a monster or an ally 1 space.
You may discard a card to draw another.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense, then reposition out of sight.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

4◆ (6☼): Play any ally's card on any hero.
5◆ (7☼): Use an action anywhere on the board.

name: Thief
abilities:
Backstab — high attack (⚔4) that IGNORES WALLS (strike through cover; your line of sight isn't blocked by walls) and PIERCES 1 (ignore a shield). +1 attack die when the target is flanked by an ally or pet. Moves diagonally (GREEN). A glass dagger: ⚔4 but 🛡1 / ❤5.

1☼ + 2֍: Use an action 2 spaces away.
5☼: Use an ally hero's card.

Escape: Flee like any hero — slip through a wall to break line of sight instantly.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Cannot be targeted or seen until your next turn.

name: Ranger
abilities:
Sharpshooter — reach 3, and +1 attack die when you strike from 2+ spaces away. Stay back and pick them off. Moves diagonally (GREEN).

2☼: Deal 2 damage to a minion in line of sight within reach.
3☼ + 4֍: Move an objective 1 space.

Escape: Flee like any hero — your range means you're rarely cornered.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (4☼): Reroll any of your movement dice.

name: Druid
abilities:
Shapeshifter — 3☼: Transform (persists until you change again; may be re-cast several times per turn). 4☼: Transform an ally for this turn.

BEAR: +1⚔ / +1🛡, and take 1 less die from minions.
TURTLE: +2🛡, and its shell RIPOSTES 1 (block everything → bite back for 1).
CHEETAH: -1🛡, but +2 to movement rolls (fast, fragile).
DEER: -1🛡; for 1☼ restore 2 life to any hero (fragile healer).

Escape: Flee like any hero — BEAR/TURTLE flee best (more shields).
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Draw an extra card.

name: Cleric
abilities:
Blessed guardian — 🛡3 and always blocks 1 hit (+1🛡 base): very hard to put down.

4☼: Restore 3 life to any living hero.
12☼: Revive any hero to half health (ends both heroes' turns).
Both your dice count as actions OR movement.

Escape: Flee like any hero — lean on your defense to block and slip away.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Give an ally +2 to a roll (you lose 2 life).
